daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are hitting different today, Sag. You're radiating that main character energy—trust it. The universe is basically handing you the aux cord, so lean into whatever feels authentic right now.
daily.love: Your emotional frequency is magnetic today. Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, people are drawn to your realness. A conversation that's been sitting in your chest wants to come out—vulnerability is your superpower rn.
daily.career: Your ideas are absolutely cooked (in the best way). This is the day to pitch that thing you've been sitting on or take on a project that actually excites you. Your confidence is the real currency—channel it.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels like play, not punishment. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever keeps your energy flowing. You're naturally more resilient today, so honor what feels good without overthinking it.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is basically asking you to trust your gut and lean into spontaneity. Mercury's vibes suggest meaningful conversations are coming your way, so show up authentically when they do.
weekly.love: There's a softness in the air around your connections. Whether you're coupled up or solo, expect some genuine moments of vulnerability that feel surprisingly right. Your authentic self is literally your love language rn.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are firing on all cylinders. This is the week to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or pivot toward work that actually energizes you. The universe is backing bold moves that align with your values.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for balance between doing and resting. Try channeling some of that Sag energy into movement that feels joyful rather than forced. Mental clarity comes when you actually slow down enough to hear yourself think.
